title: Just hit a $2.8M milestone in my portfolio
author: Ok_Beginning_8126
selftext:
Yesterday my portfolio surpassed $2.86 million, and honestly, this marks a huge personal milestone for me. There have been plenty of ups and downs along the way, so seeing this number feels a bit surreal.

But what excites me more than the figure itself is the journey of investing and learning over the years.

One thing I've realized is that investing can feel incredibly lonely at times. The internet is flooded with noise and hype stocks everywhere, making it hard to find people genuinely interested in discussing long-term investing seriously.

That's why I'm considering creating a small investor group where we can:

Share long-term stock investment philosophies

Analyze company fundamentals

Discuss risk management and portfolio strategies

Help each other filter out hype and focus on quality companies

Our goal isn't short-term trading or chasing hot stocks, but patiently building wealth over the long haul.

If you enjoy discussing serious investment principles and long-term strategies, feel free to comment or message me privately. I hope to connect with more like-minded investors.

comments.author: FiveHole23
comments.body: "message me so I can sell you my discord server"
